questions.question_text: A floor is paved with 500 identical parallelogram - shaped tiles. The base and corresponding height of each tile are 8 cm and 6 cm, respectively. What is the total area of the floor covered by the tiles in $cm^2$?

Two taps can fill a cistern in 4 hours and 17 hours, respectively. A third tap can empty it in 8 hours. How long (in hours) will it take to fill one-fourth of the empty cistern if all the taps are opened together?
Find the value of m which satisfies $$\left(\frac{22}{5}\right)^{18} \times\left(\frac{22}{5}\right)^{x} \times\left(\frac{22}{5}\right)^{6}=\left(\frac{5}{22}\right)^{9 m+4}$$
Three friends P, Q, and R start a business by investing in the ratio 2:3:5. If the total profit is ₹10,000, how much more does R receive than Q?

A vertical tower stands on level ground. From a point P on the angle of elevation to the top is $30^\circ$. After moving 100 m closer to the tower along the line joining P to the foot of the tower, the angle of elevation becomes $60^\circ$. The height of the tower is:
A shopkeeper sells a watch at a loss of 10%. If he had sold it for ₹450 more, he would have made a profit of 5%. What is the cost price of the watch?
If a sphere with radius 10 cm is painted, but 25% of its surface area is masked and not painted, what is the painted area?
A shopkeeper fixes the marked price of an item 165% above its cost price. What percentage of discount on marked price should be allowed to gain 112%?

A, B and C are three batsmen. The ratio of runs scored by them in a certain match was A : B = 15 : 17 and B : C = 14 : 19. At the end of the match, they scored 1542 runs. Find the number of runs scored by A.
A car travels 120 km at 40 km/h, 120 km at 60 km/h, and 100 km at 80 km/h. What is the average speed of the car for the whole journey?
The HCF of two numbers is 8, and their LCM is 240. If the sum of the two numbers is 88, what are the numbers?
ABC is an equilateral triangle with side 24 cm and AD is the median. If G is the centroid of the triangle ABC, find the length (in cm) of GD.
If the interest on a sum of ₹y at 10% per annum compounded annually for 2 years is ₹630, then the total amount payable at the end of the two-year period will be ____.
If the 8-digit number 79243p25 is divisible by 11, then the minimum value of p is:
In a smart city, the number of electric vehicles increased by 18% in 2021 and 22% in 2022. What is the total percentage increase in electric vehicles over the two years?
If the arithmetic mean of five numbers is 20 and one number is changed from 10 to 20, what happens to the mean?

A wholesaler offers a discount of 10% on a commodity, marked at ₹3,000, on an order of less than 20 items. Also, on an order of more than 20 items, an additional discount of 5% is offered on the commodity. What amount does a retailer have to pay to purchase 25 items of the commodity whose marked price is ₹3,000?

Riya, Kabir, and Sana start a business together. Riya invests ₹5200 for 4 months; Kabir invests ₹41000 for 2 months; Sana invests ₹39000 for 5 months. At the end of the year, their total profit is ₹12,600. What is Kabir's share of the profit (in ₹)?

The weighted average marks of a student in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics are 68. The weightages of the subjects Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics are in the ratio 5:4:3. If the student scored 80 in Physics and 70 in Chemistry, then find the marks in Mathematics.
The present ages of P and Q are in the ratio 4 : 5. Eight years ago, the ratio of their ages was 2 : 3. The harmonic mean of their present ages is
Given that $119^{0.40} = x$, $119^{0.52} = y$ and $x^z=y$, then the value of z is close to:
Three numbers are in the ratio 3 : 2 : 11, and their LCM is 3564. Their HCF is:

A car travels a distance of 540 km. For the first 3 hours, it travels at a speed of 80 km/h, and for the remaining hours, it reduces its speed to 60 km/h. Find the total time taken by the car to cover the entire distance.
The sum of two digits of a 2-digit number is 9. If the number obtained by interchanging the digits exceeds the original number by 27, find the number.
Priya lent ₹920 to her friend at 5% per annum simple interest for 3 years. How much simple interest does she earn in this period?
Which single digit should replace the blank in the number 1_36 so that the number is divisible by 9?
The population of a town decreased from 8,000 to 7,200 in one year. What is the percentage decrease?
X can finish a job in 20 days. Y can complete the same job in 15 days. If X and Y work together for 5 days and X leaves, how long will Y take to finish the remaining work?
A vendor uses a 50 g stone in place of a 60 g weight while selling salt. If he sells the salt at the cost price per kilogram, what is his profit percentage on the transaction?

options.text: It seeks to develop new industrial cities as smart cities by integrating next-generation technologies across infrastructure sectors.
It is an infrastructure initiative that aims to shape the future of urban and industrial development.
It aims at providing complete "plug and play" infrastructure till the plot level along with building sustainable future ready cities.
The program started with the launch of Palakkad-Bangalore-Mumbai-Ahmedabad Industrial Corridor in 2010.

Who among the following wrote the book "The World After Gaza"?

questions.question_text: Which combination correctly matches the device with its primary function?
Which Article allows constitutional remedies for enforcement of Fundamental Rights by courts?

options.text: Article 7 - Power of Parliament to regulate citizenship

questions.question_text: Which of the following correctly pairs the provision and its subject as per the Indian Constitution?

Which of the following classical dance forms of India originated among the Kathakars (storytellers) of northern India, later incorporating elements of Bhakti traditions as well as Persian and Central Asian influences during the Mughal period?
India and Russia conducted 14th Edition of Maritime Bilateral Exercise INDRA 2025 on which of the following coasts?

options.text: Promoting swadeshi through the boycott of foreign goods and local production
Replacing mass meetings with secret organisations focused on covert action
Limiting participation to educated elites through controlled political forums
Adopting British constitutional practices as the primary model for reform

questions.question_text: Which of the following activities formed a central component of the extremist strategy of political mobilisation in the early nationalist phase of India's freedom struggle?
A.R. Rahman won the Academy Award for Best Original Score for which film?
In which year was the Hindustan Republican Association (HRA) formed?
The Sardar Sarovar Project is built on which river?
Diabetes, cancer, and asthma are collectively known as which type of disorders?
The Arms Act of 1878 was introduced during the tenure of which Viceroy of British India?
Which molecule is primarily responsible for storing genetic information in most living organisms?
Who among the following announced the UN80 initiative in 2025?

options.text: To celebrate Khilji's victory over the Cholas
To serve as a trading hub for the Songara Rajputs
To protect Delhi from Mongol attacks

options.text: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

questions.question_text: Which Indian ministry, in collaboration with the International Council for Circular Economy (ICCE), unveiled the 'I Am Circular' Coffee Table Book in April 2024?
Who succeeded Bahlol Lodi and ascended the throne in AD 1489?
In March 2025, ISRO developed Vikram 3201 and Kalpana 3201. These are example of which of the following?

options.text: National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD)

questions.question_text: Which institution is primarily responsible for providing and regulating credit for the promotion of agriculture and rural development in India?
A computer's characteristic of Accuracy means it can produce precise and correct results as long as the ______ is/are correct.
Considering the periodic trends, which property explains why noble gases are chemically inert under standard conditions?

Under an MoU signed on 2 September 2025 between the Department of Ex-Servicemen Welfare and Patanjali Yoggram, nearly 40 million veterans and their dependents will receive free access to which type of treatment?
Which of the following is an example of a fibre crop in India?
The Right to Information Act 2005 was extended to the whole of India except which of the following state/UT at the time of enactment in 2005?
Where is the head office of the National Institute of Rural Development and Panchayati Raj in India?
The governor can dissolve Vidhan Sabha before the completion of its term on the advice of the_____.
The thorn and scrub vegetation of India is mainly found in which region?
The dissolution of which of the following in water makes the solution acidic due to the formation of sulphurous acid?

Files that begin with the word "invoice"
Files that contain exactly the word "invoice"
Files that end with the word "invoice"

questions.question_text: What is the primary function of the keyboard shortcut Ctrl + H in applications like MS Word?
Which two countries signed a peace accord known as the 'Kuala Lumpur Peace Accord' in October 2025?
Which neighbouring country is separated from India by the Palk Strait?
Which of the following traditional art forms originated in the Mithila region of Bihar?
In which year was the Ninth Amendment to the Constitution passed in India?
Select the pair which follows the same pattern as that followed by the two pairs given below. Both pairs follow the same pattern. OCF-GFI YXA-XAD
What should come in place of the '?' in the given series? 8 15 28 53 ? 199

Based on the English alphabetical order, three of the following four letter-clusters are alike in a certain way and thus form a group. Which is the one that does not belong to that group? (Note: The odd one out is not based on the number of consonants/vowels or their position in the letter-cluster.)
Select the triad which follows the same pattern as that followed by the two triads given below. Both triads follow the same pattern. TORK - ORKF - RKFO TUCK - UOKT - OUKT

Refer to the given number series and answer the question that follows. All numbers are single-digit numbers only. Counting to be done from left to right only. (Left) 3 9 5 3 8 4 4 2 9 8 9 4 6 6 5 7 7 2 4 1 3 6 3 (Right) How many of such even digits are there, each of which is immediately preceded by an odd digit and also immediately followed by an even digit?

In a certain code language, 'B' means 'A is the mother of B', 'A#B' means 'A is the wife of B', 'A@B' means 'A is the brother of B' and 'A&B' means 'A is the father of B'. How is S related to H if 'S # D & R @ Y + H'?

Seven boxes, G, H, I, L, M, N and O, are kept one over the other, but not necessarily in the same order. No box is kept below L. Only four boxes are kept between M and L. H is kept above M. Only two boxes are kept between O and N. I is kept immediately above G. N is not kept immediately above I. Which box is kept fourth from the bottom?

Anamika starts from Point A and drives 2 km towards the north. She then takes a right turn, drives 5 km, turns right and drives 7 km. She then takes a right turn and drives 8 km and reaches Point B. What is the straight-line distance (shortest distance) and towards which direction should she drive in order to reach Point A again? (All turns are $90^\circ$ turns unless only unless specified.)

Each vowel in the word CONTACT is changed to the letter immediately following it in the English alphabetical order and each consonant is changed to the letter immediately preceding it in the new English alphabetical order. How many of the following letters will be first from the right in the new group of letters thus formed?

Based on the English alphabetical order, three of the following four letter-cluster pairs are alike in a certain way and thus form a group. Which letter-cluster pair DOES NOT belong to that group? (Note: The odd one out is not based on the number of consonants/vowels or their position in the letter-cluster.)
Select the pair which follows the same pattern as that followed by the two sets of pairs given below. Both pairs follow the same pattern. EOK : HEY EQK : UAJ

Seven boxes R, A, N, O, D, M and S are kept one over the other but not necessarily in the same order. Only five boxes are kept above N. Only three boxes are kept between N and S. R is kept at one of the positions below N. Only D is kept between S and R. A is kept at one of the positions above S. How many boxes are kept between R and O?

Based on the English alphabetical order, three of the following four letter-cluster pairs are alike in a certain way and thus form a group. Which is the one that does not belong to that group? (Note: The odd one out is not based on the number of consonants/vowels or their position in the letter-cluster.)

If 3 is added to each odd digit and 2 is subtracted from each even digit in the number 8254316, then what will be the sum of the digits that are third from the left and third from the right in the new number thus formed?
In a certain code language, "JCPV" is coded as "51" and "DYSF" is coded as "48". What is the code for "HTOB" in that given language?

Refer to the following letter series and answer the question that follows. Counting to be done from left to right only. (Left) R D A U F U E Q Y U M Y G J S P B A J L Q S H (Right) How many of such consonants are there, each of which is immediately preceded by a vowel and also immediately followed by a consonant?
Which of the following letter-number clusters will replace the question mark (?) in the given series to make it logically complete? PMR 80, BLR 23, XPF 66 , BTJ 59 , ?
In a certain code language, 'zip sip unit' is coded as 'an ax jn' and 'wife zip house' is coded as 'jn yi fj'. How is 'zip' coded in that language?
If 'Y' stands for 'x', 'B' stands for '=', 'C' stands for '+' and 'D' stands for '-', what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following equation? 34 B 45 D 5 A 2 C 4 = ?
A is the wife of C. L and O are the son and daughter of C, respectively. Q is the wife of L and M is the father of O. M is the husband of O and M is the father of D. How is A related to D?
What should come in place of '?' in the given series? 47 61 78 98 121 147 ?
If + means -, - means x, x means +, and = means +, then what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following equation? $41 - 16 \times 271 + 611 \times 13 = ?$

Seven boxes M, N, O, P, X, Y and Z are kept one over the other but not necessarily in the same order. Only N is kept above P. Only two boxes are kept between P and X. Only O is kept below Y. Z is not kept immediately above X. Which box is kept second above M?

Read the given statement(s) and conclusions carefully. Assuming that the information given in the statements is true even if it appears to be at variance with commonly known facts, decide which of the given conclusions logically follow(s) from the statement(s). Statements: All desktops are fans. All fans are cups. Conclusions: (I) Some desktops are fans. (II) All desktops are cups.
What should come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series based on the English alphabetical order? QSR NRQ MQP LPO ?

A, B, D, J, O, T and Z are sitting around a circular table facing the center. Only two persons are sitting between T and O when counted from the left of T. Z is an immediate neighbor of Z. Only one person sits between Z and O when counted from the left of Z. J. O is not an immediate neighbor of A or T. Two people are sitting to the left of D. How many people sit between B and O when counted from the left of O?

Select the set in which the numbers are related in the same way as are the numbers of the following sets. (NOTE: Operations should be performed on the whole numbers, without breaking down the numbers into its constituent digits. E.g., 13 - Operations on 13 such as adding/subtracting/multiplying etc. to 13 can be performed. Breaking down 13 into 1 and 3 and then performing mathematical operations on 1 and 3 is not allowed.) (5, 8, 14) (10, 22, 46)

Seven people A, B, C, D, E, F and G, are sitting in a row, facing north. F sits third to the left of A and F sits third to the right of D. E sits third to the left of B and B sits to the immediate left of G. How many people sit between G and E?

Read the given statement(s) and conclusions carefully. Assuming that the information given in the statements is true even if it appears to be at variance with commonly known facts, decide which of the given conclusions logically follow(s) from the statement(s). Statements: All desktops are fans. All fans are cups. Conclusions: (I) Some desktops are fans. (II) All desktops are cups.
Which of the following letter-number clusters will replace the question mark (?) in the given series to make it logically complete? P3V3, W2C13, D4J23 , K7G33, ?
